node.text: Joanna finished her first full screenplay last Friday, which is a mix of drama and romance.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "finish first screenplay") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Joanna is writing a movie script, a love story with lots of challenges.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "finish first screenplay") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Joanna plans to submit her screenplay to film festivals and hopes to attract producers and directors to check it out.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "finish first screenplay") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.94)

node.text: Joanna has done research and networking non-stop for her script and is determined to make it happen.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "finish first screenplay") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: Joanna finished a screenplay but received a rejection letter from a major company.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "finish first screenplay") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.88)

node.text: In inspiring places like the trails, Joanna feels like writing a drama.

node.text: Joanna submitted a few scripts last week and expects some rejections.

node.text: Joanna feels supported and motivated by having someone throughout the process.
Joanna appreciates Nate's kind words and encouragement.
Joanna finished a presentation for producers last Friday.
